arts.ttl: Lionel Messi speaks out on future amid Barcelona return links
arts.sum: Former Barcelona star Lionel Messi has on Friday spoken out on his immediate plans for the future. The name of Argentine icon Messi has of course returned to the forefront…

arts.ttl: New look at Barcelona’s home jersey for 2025/26
arts.sum: A fresh look at the jersey expected to be made use of by La Liga giants Barcelona in home fixtures next season has today come to the fore online. Leaks…

arts.ttl: What to look out for as Barcelona take on Real Sociedad in La Liga
arts.sum: When it comes to scoring, Barcelona will be worth watching from set-pieces against Real Sociedad as it’s become a feature of their play under Flick this season. Goals can be expected too as Barca have scored in each of their last 37 home matches against La Real in La Liga and haven’t drawn a blank for a very long time/

arts.ttl: Vitor Roque speaks for the first time since departing Barcelona for Palmeiras
arts.sum: Now-former Barcelona star Vitor Roque has on Friday spoken publicly for the first time as a new Palmeiras player. This comes after his return to Brazil was this evening made…

arts.ttl: Stat: Barcelona have 3 of the top 4 chance creators in La Liga this season
arts.sum: A head-turning statistic, highlighting the creative excellence of Barcelona’s leading stars this season, has on Friday come to the fore online. The info comes courtesy of statisticians WhoScored, and surrounds…

arts.ttl: Man United's Andre Onana replacement mission in danger as Barcelona 'make contact' over £24.8m goalkeeper
arts.sum: Barcelona and Bayer Leverkusen apparently enter the race for increasingly in-demand goalkeeper Joan Garcia, also linked with Arsenal and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: One Barcelona star has attempted 42 free-kicks without scoring a goal
arts.sum: A concerning statistic surrounding the set-piece exploits of a leading member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona has on Friday come to the fore online. The info…

arts.ttl: Chelsea, Arsenal in line for transfer boost as Barcelona 'request information' on £144m-rated attacker
arts.sum: Barcelona apparently 'ask for information' on AC Milan attacker Rafael Leao, who has a mammoth £144.4m release clause in his Rossoneri contract.

arts.ttl: Barcelona & Atlético Madrid ready to lock horns over signing of La Liga star
arts.sum: Two of Spanish football’s biggest clubs could well be set to fight it out over the signature of Rayo Vallecano standout Andrei Rațiu this summer. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo,…

arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: Barcelona sell Vitor Roque to Palmeiras
arts.sum: “FC Barcelona and Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras have reached an agreement for the transfer of the player Vitor Roque. Barcelona have confirmed that a deal has been agreed for Vitor Roque to leave the club and join Palmeiras on a permanent transfer.
